title: Shulker Preview
description: Allows you to see contents of a shulker without placing it.
body:
# Shulker Preview

---

Shulker Preview is a client-side mod that lets you open a shulker without placing it (however, you can't take the items it contains).  
The button to view the contents of the shulker can be changed from the game options.

Here is a demo :

![Preview Shulker Demo](https://github.com/kgriff0n/shulker-preview/raw/master/img/shulker-demo.gif)

As of **version 1.2**, you can also open shulkers in inventory and containers.

**Each shulker color has its own display :**

| ![Yellow Shulker](https://github.com/kgriff0n/shulker-preview/raw/master/img/yellow-shulker.png) | ![Red Shulker](https://github.com/kgriff0n/shulker-preview/raw/master/img/red-shulker.png)   |
|-------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|
| ![Pink Shulker](https://github.com/kgriff0n/shulker-preview/raw/master/img/pink-shulker.png)     | ![Lime Shulker](https://github.com/kgriff0n/shulker-preview/raw/master/img/lime-shulker.png) |

[![MinecraftStorage Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec0120705f77bd6c0c7e5b79e889afed1bafe9c4_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/shulker-preview)
